title: Viz.ai - AI-Powered Care Coordination Platform
problem: Stroke and cardiovascular emergencies require rapid diagnosis and coordinated response across care teams, but delays are common.
solution: AI-powered care coordination platform that automatically detects conditions from medical imaging and alerts care teams instantly, enabling rapid response.
technology: Deep learning for medical imaging, automated alert systems, care team coordination workflows
target_customer: Health systems, stroke centers, cardiology departments, emergency departments
ai_type: Deep learning, computer vision for medical imaging
traction_signals: FDA cleared for stroke, pulmonary embolism, aortic dissection
varden_fit: VERY HIGH - Automated detection + care team coordination is exactly Varden's model. Could expand beyond stroke/cardiology to other specialties.
notes: Best-in-class example of AI + care coordination. Model for specialty care routing.
